text: - h. Owner's Election to Modify or Discontinue the Owner Controlled Insurance Program. Owner may, for any reason, modify the coverage provided by the OCIP Policies, discontinue the Policies or any part thereof, or request that any Enrolled Party withdraw from the OCIP Program upon thirty (30) days written notice.  Upon such notice, such Enrolled Party shall obtain and thereafter maintain during the performance of the Work, all (or a portion thereof as specified by Owner) of the OCIP Policies.  The form, content, limits of liability and the insurer issuing such replacement insurance shall be as set forth in this Exhibit for both on-site and offsite operations. The cost of the replacement insurance shall be as approved by the Owner.
